title: Biomes N' Blocks
description: The Biomes N' Blocks modpack aims to provide a wide addition of Vanilla+ biomes and blocks aimed to increase the palette and textures of minecraft.
body:
The Biomes N' Blocks modpack aims to provide a wide addition of Vanilla+ biomes and blocks aimed to increase the palette and textures of minecraft.
This mod adds:
- 170+ new biomes
- 73 new animals
- 24000+ new blocks, including block variants, statues, and furniture!
- 75+ new structures and structure overhauls
- many new items, crops, and foods
- an overhauled enchantment system
- 6 different shaders

These numbers are estimations I have gotten by the descriptions of the included mods, there may be some duplicates. If you have any suggestions for mods I should add, check out the discord: [https://discord.gg/GNTG9n9t](https://discord.gg/GNTG9n9t)

If there are any discrepancies between game versions please let me know on the discord.
Note: the numbers here are based off of the larger 1.20.1 editions of this mod.
